   Over: "Give the liver to Patient A — younger patients get more life-years from the transplant"

Your preferences form a cycle: you preferred You chose "Give the liver to Patient A — younger patients get more life..." over "Give the liver to Patient B — he has waited longer and the w...", then "Give the liver to Patient B — he has waited longer and the w..." over "Give the liver to Patient B — his surgical work saves many m...", then "Give the liver to Patient B — his surgical work saves many m..." over "Give the liver to Patient A — younger patients get more life..." — forming a cycle.. - The principle or value you think should take priority
